networkfirewall.firewall.subnetmapping.C: The ID for a subnet that you want to associate with the firewall. AWS Network Firewall creates an instance of the associated firewall in each subnet that you specify, to filter traffic in the subnet's Availability Zone.

networkfirewall.firewall.subnetmapping.I.Description: The subnet's IP address type. You can't change the IP address type after you create the subnet.

networkfirewall.firewall.subnetmapping.S.Description: The unique identifier for the subnet.
